overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the colorful Mediterranean-style medieval town of Toussaint. The character navigates cobblestone streets, briefly interacts with a wooden gate, and traverses staircases through narrow elevated passages on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: colorful main street with ornate palace view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cobblestone street toward the large ornate building ahead

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking ahead on the right side of the street

entered.detail: large red and yellow building with arched windows and decorative balconies at the end of the street
patterned cobblestone road surface with light and shadow from buildings
large planters with vibrant pink flowers lining the left side of the street
decorative white stone balustrade along the left sidewalk
vibrant orange and red buildings with shutters and balconies on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit cobblestone street in a colorful medieval town. Geralt walks forward toward an ornate palace building visible in the distance, passing flower pots and stone railings on the left while vibrant townhouses line the right. A few pedestrians are scattered along the path.

events.description: character turns right toward a wooden side gate
character opens the wooden gate and examines the yellow notice board attached to the fence
character turns back toward the main street

agents.ego_description: approaching and opening a wooden side gate to inspect a notice, then turning back to the main street

entered.detail: tall wooden gate with vertical planks and metal hinges set in a stone frame
yellow parchment notice posted on the wooden fence to the right of the gate
large carved stone column framing the left side of the gate entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns right into a narrow enclosed area featuring a wooden gate set between stone pillars. He opens the gate and examines a yellow notice board before turning back toward the street. The palace building and flower pots from the previous view are now behind him.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy town street with market activity

events.description: passing through a large stone archway into a narrower street section

agents.ego_description: walking through a crowd of townspeople and continuing down the street toward an archway

notable_agents.action: group of women in period dresses walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large stone arch bridge connecting buildings overhead with weathered red and beige stonework
faded painted mural on the left wall depicting pastoral scenes
wooden cart or stall with goods displayed on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Returning to the main street, Geralt navigates through a moderate crowd of townspeople in period clothing. He passes a weathered mural and a market stall before walking under a large stone archway that bridges the street overhead. The colorful buildings now appear on the left as he progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep outdoor staircase to upper terrace

events.description: character begins ascending a long stone staircase on the left side of the street
emerging from the stairwell onto an upper terrace with a view of the ocean

agents.ego_description: climbing a steep stone staircase alongside a blue building, passing under a vine-covered arch

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing near the bottom of the stairs

entered.detail: long flight of weathered stone steps with a solid stone balustrade on the right
vibrant blue building with white window frames and green shutters on the left side of the stairs
painted mural on the right wall depicting grapevines and pastoral scenes
distant view of blue sea and sky visible through the archway at the top of the stairs
elevated walkway with stone paving and laundry lines visible at the top of the ascent

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns left and begins ascending a steep stone staircase between a blue building and a mural-painted wall. He climbs past a guard at the bottom and emerges through a vine-covered arch onto an upper terrace, where a sudden view of the distant ocean opens up beyond the rooftops.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alley with hanging laundry

events.description: character begins descending stone stairs into a narrow alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking down a shaded staircase and through a narrow alley with laundry hanging overhead

entered.detail: tight passage between tall buildings with cobblestone ground and overhead coverings
white sheets and cloths strung on lines between buildings creating a canopy overhead
stacked wooden boxes and barrels along the right wall of the alley

segments.scene_description: Leaving the terrace, Geralt descends a stone staircase into a narrow, shadowed alleyway. The space is enclosed by tall walls with laundry hanging on lines overhead, creating a sheltered corridor. Wooden crates line the walls as he walks deeper into the passage, with the bright ocean view now behind him.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant Mediterranean town that shifts from wide, sunlit streets to an elevated terrace and finally into a secluded, shadowed alley. It begins with Geralt walking along a cobblestone path lined with colorful townhouses and flower pots toward a distant palace, before turning into a narrow enclosure to examine a yellow notice board by a wooden gate. As he returns to the main street, the camera navigates through a crowd of townspeople and under a large stone archway, eventually turning left to ascend a steep staircase between a blue building and a mural. The scene then opens onto a vine-covered upper terrace with a sudden view of the distant ocean beyond the rooftops, before turning downward into a narrow, sheltered corridor. Finally, the bright light fades as Geralt descends into a shadowed alleyway enclosed by tall walls with laundry hanging overhead and wooden crates lining the path.
